title: **🎭 Putrec da Trickster**
description: Come 'ere and let da Ork Trickster rob ya... I mean, play and 'ave fun, humie.
canvas_trickster_overview_description: Look at all da wayz Putre can take yer gold.

canvas_trickster_subrole_descriptions.dice_game: 🎲 **DA BIG POT** - Play 'gainst da house, toss da bonez and rob da pot!
canvas_trickster_subrole_descriptions.ring: 👁️ **Ring Hunter** - Accuse uvver gitz of carryin' da Shiny Ring

dice_game.rankingvoid: No gitz on da board, humie!
dice_game.historyvoid: No one played yet, ya cowards!
dice_game.help:
**DA POT Help**
 Play Putrec'z POT, bet gold and toss bonez to win! Uze da 'Play' button in Canvas to start.
 If da humie getz three onez, 'e robz da POT!
dice_game.title: 💰 DA BIG POT 💰**
dice_game.current_balance: Gold in da POT right now:
dice_game.use_command: 💡 Uze da 'Play' button in `!canvas` → Trickster → Da Pot to toss da skullz, flabby humie!
dice_game.no_prize: {combination} - ¡NAH! No loot for ya! More gold for da horde, beat it perdedor!
dice_game.error_servers_only: ¡GRRR! Diz move only workz in campz, stupid humie!
dice_game.error_game_unavailable: ¡BLEGH! Da bone game ain't ready in diz camp!
dice_game.error_database_access: ¡GRRR! Can't find da gold pile in da vault!
dice_game.help_descripcion: ¡GRRR! Try yer luck wiv Putrec'z pot! 🎲
dice_game.announcements_on_description: Putre will yell when someone robz da pot
dice_game.dice_fixed_bet_description: Set how much gold it costz to play
dice_game.dice_pot_value_description: Set how much gold startz in da pot
dice_game.ring_on_description: Start da hunt for da shiny
dice_game.ring_frequency_description: Set how fast Putre lookz for gitz
dice_game.dice_stats_description: See how much ya won or lost
dice_game.help_balance: • Canvas UI - See how big da pot iz
dice_game.help_stats: • Canvas UI - See yer own mess
dice_game.help_ranking: • Canvas UI - See da top looterz
dice_game.help_config: • Canvas UI → Config (Boss only) - Set da price
dice_game.help_announcements: • Canvas UI → Config (Boss only) - Turn yellin' on/off
dice_game.help_partial_info: • Small prizez come from da Boss's pile
dice_game.admin_description: Change da game and da yellin' settings
dice_game.help_sent_private: 📩 Dice help tossed to yer box.
dice_game.stats_sent_private: 📩 Yer mess sent to yer box.
dice_game.sent_private: 📩 Pot balance sent to yer box.
dice_game.error_system_unavailable: ❌ Bone game iz broken in diz camp.
dice_game.history_no_games: 📜 **LAST GAMES** - No one tossed bonez yet.
dice_game.error_private_message: ❌ Diz only workz in campz, not in private cavez.
dice_game.no_games_played: 🎲 **Ya didn't play yet!** - Uze `!canvas` → Trickster to start!
dice_game.medium_pot: 📈 **Medium Pot** - Worth a toss now, humie!
dice_game.small_pot: 📉 **Small Pot** - Not many dead gitz yet, let it grow!
dice_game.dm_default_server_message: *Yerin' in a cave, uzin' da first camp I find.*
dice_game.dm_no_servers_available: ❌ No campz found. Go to a camp to toss bonez.
dice_game.dm_server_access_error: ❌ Can't reach da camp. Go dere and play.
dice_game.big_pot:
🔥 **DA POT IZ BURNIN' LIKE AN ELF VILLAGE!** 🔥
Dere'z **{balance:,}** gold coinz! Uze `!canvas` → Trickster to rob it before Putre kickz ya! 🎲
dice_game.rules:
-**Three Eyez of GRUUMSH** 👁️ and ya take da **POT**!
 -Straight **(4,5,6)** multipliez bet **x5**! BLOODY RAID 🗡️ !
 - Get any **Three of a kind** 💀 and take **x3** yer bet.
 - A **Pair** of fangs 🐺 **getz yer gold back**.
dice_game.description: **Info:** Try yer luck wiv Putrec'z POT! 🎲 Toss bonez 'gainst da house and take all da gold if ya can!

ring.title: 👁️ **PUTRE RING HUNTER** 👁️
ring.description: 🔍 Da hunter will chase ya till da end of time, accuse uvver gitz to save yer skin.
ring.status_active: ✅ **HUNT ON** - Putrec iz lookin' for da shiny
ring.status_inactive: ❌ **HUNT OFF** - Putrec iz havin' a nap
ring.investigation_instructions:
• Uze **Ring: Accuse** from da menu
• Type: username
• Ya can also accuse while yappin' wiv Putrec.
ring.investigation_warning:
⚠️ **IMPORTANT:**
• Don't accuse yerself, ya git
• Don't accuse bots, dey don't 'ave fingerz
• Da Boss must turn da hunt on first
ring.inactive_instructions:
To start da hunt:
• A Boss must go to **Ring Admin**
• Click **Ring: On** to wake Putre up
• Set da speed for lookin' at gitz

Once it'z on, ya can start snitchin'!
ring.controls:
**Knobz**
- Turn hunt on/off
- Change how fast I check gitz
ring.admin_description: Set up da hunt and how often I sniff da ring

dropdown.ring_accuse_description: Snitch on a git for carryin' da Shiny Ring
